repo.description: MonGPT is a marketing site for an AI support agent targeting Asian markets, featuring 25+ free SEO tools, localized landing pages in 8+ languages, and a multilingual docs hub. It's a Next.js static export deployed on Cloudflare Pages with edge-based geo-locale redirects.

cards.title: Add rate limiting to demo API endpoints
cards.rationale: Demo endpoints invoke costly AI models with zero abuse protection visible in code.
bullets: Cap file uploads and scrape frequency in middleware

cards.title: Add mobile navigation menu to header
cards.rationale: Nav links are hidden below md breakpoint with no hamburger or drawer alternative.
bullets: Add hamburger toggle for screens below md breakpoint
Reuse locale switcher and CTA in mobile drawer
Mirror desktop nav structure with animated slide-down

cards.title: Add unit tests for markdown converters
cards.rationale: Pure converter functions in toMarkdown.ts have zero test coverage and feed every tool page.
bullets: Test htmlToMarkdown, csvToMarkdown, jsonToMarkdown edge cases
Add CI step to run tests on PR

cards.title: Add competitor comparison pages
cards.rationale: SaaS buyers search 'MonGPT vs Intercom' before buying; these pages capture high-intent traffic.
bullets: Auto-generate sitemap entries for each comparison page

cards.title: Add interactive guided demo page
cards.rationale: Visitors need to experience the bot before signing up; current DemoWidget only loads with env flag.
bullets: Show language-switching and voice features live
Add guided walkthrough with step indicators

cards.title: Add customer testimonials section
cards.rationale: Homepage lacks social proof — critical for trust in a support-agent purchase decision.
bullets: Add logo strip and quote cards to homepage
Include metrics like response time reduction
